diagnostics: mapbox-vector-tile not installed. Install: pip install mapbox-vector-tile

No MVT/vector tile URL template found in clientconfigs/clientconfigurations and no Lizard tile path responded usefully. To enable Method 1, supply a tile URL template (e.g. https://.../{z}/{x}/{y}.mvt) for the catchment layer in data/lizard_catchments_approx/inputs/config/method1_tiles.json as {"template": "...", "min_z": int, "max_z": int, "layer_name_in_tile": "..."} and re-run.

GetFeatureInfo requires an explicit (queryable) WMS layer URL for the catchment polygon layer plus a probe AOI. Supply data/lizard_catchments_approx/inputs/config/method2_gfi.json = {"wms_url": "...", "layer_name": "...", "version": "1.3.0", "crs": "EPSG:4326", "bbox": [minLon, minLat, maxLon, maxLat], "width": 256, "height": 256, "info_format": "application/json", "sample_points": [[lon, lat], ...] }} and re-run.

Note: even a queryable WMS layer typically returns per-pixel attribute scalars from GetFeatureInfo, NOT polygon geometry. This method can only produce real polygons if the server is configured to return geometry (rare). The WMS endpoints inspected in Phase 2 returned only elevation scalars for the working layer (raster_eae92c48-... global DEM).

data/lizard_catchments_approx/inputs/config/method3_config.json not present. To enable, supply: {"tile_url_template": "https://.../{z}/{x}/{y}.png", "min_z": int, "max_z": int, "bbox_lonlat": [minLon, minLat, maxLon, maxLat], "target_rgb": [r, g, b], "rgb_tolerance": int, "simplify_tolerance_deg": float}.

No georeferenced screenshots in data/lizard_catchments_approx/inputs/screenshots. To enable: drop a PNG with sidecar .pgw worldfile + a *_meta.json describing {"epsg": int, "target_rgb": [r,g,b], "rgb_tolerance": int, "simplify_tolerance_deg": float, "source_url": str, "capture_timestamp_utc": str}, OR a self-describing GeoTIFF (requires rasterio: pip install rasterio).

fitness_for_use.reason: Approximated geometry has unbounded boundary error relative to the authoritative Council/Lizard polygon. Catchment rainfall depths are highly sensitive to boundary placement, so any approximation is unsuitable for hydrologic calculation.
